name: River Bandits at the Mill Crossing
description: Three rough men lounge on the mossy stones of Millbrook's river crossing, toll-collectors of their own devising. The mill wheel turns lazily behind them as their leader flicks a knife between his fingers and grins.
failureConsequence: The bandits relieve you of your supplies and shove you into the shallows. You drag yourself onto the far bank, soaked and lighter of purse.
